# Legacy Migration Skill

## Purpose

Assess legacy and multi-repo change impact before execution.

## When To Use

- migration plans
- legacy code modernization
- high-blast-radius refactors

## Workflow

1. Map dependencies and downstream consumers.
2. Identify breakage risks and migration order.
3. Propose phased rollout and rollback strategy.

## Guardrails

- Prefer compatibility-first changes.
- Highlight unknowns explicitly.
